title: Video: Getting vaccinated during your pregnancy shares protection with your baby | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC

At a glance 
A video encouraging pregnant women to discuss recommended vaccines with healthcare providers. Share videos from the From Me, To You communications effort to encourage pregnant women to receive recommended vaccinations during their pregnancy.
Format: MP4 Language: English (US) Length: 
Low Resolution Video 
More from the From Me, to You series 
From Me, To You: a culturally responsive communications effort from CDC designed to reach Black pregnant women, Black women who may choose to become pregnant, and healthcare providers to encourage conversations about vaccination during pregnancy.
Learn more .
